profile.evidence: Agent: Hello. Agent: Yeah, very good afternoon, sir. This side Gautam from HDFC Life. Agent: Yeah, actually sir, mera jo call karne ka purpose hai, woh HDFC Life ka hamara ek aisa guaranteed saving product hai, jisme aapko first year se hi 40 percent ki income aani start ho jaati hai, woh bhi aapke lifetime. Agent: Isme aapke family ke do member bhi cover hain, double tax ka benefit bhi mil jaata hai aur jo sabse most important part rahega, woh rahega WOP ka benefit. Agent: Toh ek baar main better tarike se clear karna chahunga, waise age jaan sakta hoon aapki running age kya hogi?
profile.summary: The agent delivered a pitch for an HDFC Life product and attempted discovery, but the call ended without any customer response.

compliance.return_claim_quote: first year se hi 40 percent ki income aani start ho jaati hai
